title: Run go-fed/testsuite (test.activitypub.dev) against smallhold
description: The go-fed test suite at https://test.activitypub.dev is the functional replacement for the defunct W3C test suite. Tests C2S and S2S ActivityPub compliance. Point it at a running smallhold instance and work through failures.
close_reason: go-fed AP compliance: 12/12 tests PASS (WebFinger, actor doc, content negotiation, outbox, collections, inbox auth, NodeInfo, host-meta, featured, publicKey)
